boundary_binding.action_boundary: May finance book, release, defer, capitalize, consolidate, or recognize the requested accounting action now? Focus: revenue recognition with delivery acceptance before cutoff.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Cannot allow without closed source boundary
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Escalate due to unresolved delivery acceptance

final_answer: Source records show missing delivery acceptance evidence before cutoff. Control record does not close boundary. Policy requires exact match from current sources only. Action may not proceed. Escalate to resolve dependencies.
